---
name: "💡 Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for JS Tap-Tap
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it clearly.
(e.g. *"I find it frustrating that I can't reset my password without editing JSON..."*)

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of the feature you'd like to see added.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you thought of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've already tried?

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, or references to similar features in other games/apps.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have checked the [Roadmap](../../blob/main/ROADMAP.md) — this isn't already planned.
- [ ] I have checked open [Issues](../../issues) — this isn't already requested.
